creator: kpect@protonmail.com
text:
Thanks Stefan,
I suppose that's not a big issue for me now. I've noticed that sometimes everything is deleted, but not always. I just tried to modify my portmaster.rc so that I could reuse already built packages, especially build dependencies, because before I had to build 'em over and over again. For now, I'm going to modify portmaster.rc so that it would fetch precompiled build dependencies, use them and remove afterwards.
